layers.name: wall_edge_stone
layers.description: Transparent painted wall piece on transparent background: cracked stone brick wall section running horizontally across the middle of the frame, mossy edges, slight cyan rift hint in cracks, painterly hand-painted, top-down 30-35 degree angled view. Single wall edge piece for placement against room boundary, NO floor below, NO floor stones, transparent above and below the wall strip.
layers.negative_description: tile, grid, square edges, floor texture, full scene, character, person, rectangular floor base, stone floor

layers.name: wall_decoration_vines
layers.description: Transparent decoration overlay on transparent background: hanging vines, moss tendrils, and a small tattered banner, painterly hand-painted, cool gray and green palette. Vertical hanging decoration suitable for placement on a stone wall, NO wall background, NO floor.
layers.negative_description: tile, grid, square edges, full scene, wall background, floor texture, character
